steps.title: Find P(C)
steps.content: Total visitors $= 500$. Since every visitor is in room A, B, or C, the probabilities sum to 1. So $P(C) = 1 - 0.62 - 0.30 = 0.08$.

steps.title: Compute the count in room C
steps.content:
Multiply by the total to get the count in room C:
$$0.08 \times 500 = 40$$
B matches.
